form.autoCheckInEnabledDesc: Whether this account participates in daily check-in when global auto check-in is enabled
form.checkInStatus: Check-in status detection (requires the site to have check-in enabled)
form.cookieAuthSessionCookieDesc: Import this account's session cookie from a logged-in browser tab (import separately for multi-account)
form.customCheckInDesc: External check-in/welfare site URL where you can get account balance or redeem codes
form.exchangeRateDesc: Indicates how much RMB is needed to recharge 1 USD. The system will try to get it automatically, please fill in manually if not obtained
form.excludeFromTotalBalanceDesc: Skips this account in the Total Balance aggregate without disabling refresh or check-in
form.manualBalanceUsdDesc: Use this when the site cannot fetch balance/quota automatically
form.openRedeemWithCheckIn: Also open redeem page when using external check-in
form.sub2apiCheckInUnsupported: Sub2API does not support site check-in (disabled automatically).
form.sub2apiRefreshTokenModeDesc: Optional. Store the refresh_token of the current dashboard session in the extension so each Sub2API account can refresh and renew authentication independently in the background (supports multiple accounts on one site).
form.sub2apiRefreshTokenWarningDesc: Refresh tokens are long-lived credentials used for Plugin Hosted Sessions. They are saved with the account (e.g. backups/exports). To avoid rotation conflicts, import from an incognito/private window and close it; avoid using the same dashboard session in parallel.
form.tagsDeleteDescription: Delete "{{name}}" globally. This will remove it from all accounts.
form.tagsDescription: Use tags to categorize accounts for quick filtering
form.validRateError: Please enter a valid exchange rate, greater than 0

infoPanel.autoDetectInfo: Please log in to the target site first, the extension will automatically detect the site type and automatically get the access token
infoPanel.confirmAddInfo: Please confirm that the account information is correct before clicking the 'Confirm Add' button
infoPanel.editInfoDesc: After modifying the account information, the system will re-verify and get the latest balance data
infoPanel.ldohSiteListHint: No site yet? LDOH provides a directory of many public-benefit AI sites from the Linux.do community.
infoPanel.manualInfo: Manually fill in the account information. The account will be saved securely in local storage
infoPanel.reDetectInfo: If the site information changes, it is recommended to click the 'Re-detect' button (you need to log in to the target site first by yourself)

messages.autoDetectTakingTooLong: Auto-detect is taking longer than expected. Open troubleshooting guide.
messages.importCookiesEmpty: No browser cookies were found for this site. Log in on this site first, then try again.
messages.importCookiesFailedUnknown: Failed to import cookies due to an unknown error.
messages.importCookiesPermissionDenied: The extension could not read this site's cookies. Check the browser's cookie/site permissions for this site, then try again.
messages.importSub2apiSessionMissing: No refresh_token found. Please log in to the Sub2API dashboard and try again.

siteInfo.alreadyAdded: Account(s) already exist for this site
siteInfo.cookieWarning: Prefer access tokens. Cookie auth requires importing a session cookie, and it may expire/renew and stop working, requiring re-import; for multiple accounts on the same site, import a session cookie per account. Use only when necessary.
siteInfo.sub2apiAuthOnly: Sub2API only supports Access Token authentication (JWT)
siteInfo.sub2apiHint: Sub2API uses short-term JWTs. When they expire, the extension will automatically try to obtain a new JWT using a temporary window (requires being logged in on the site). With "Plugin Hosted Session" enabled, each account can automatically refresh and renew authentication independently in the background, supporting multiple accounts on the same site.

duplicateAccount.description_one: You already have {{count}} account for {{siteUrl}}. Adding another may create duplicates. Do you want to continue?
duplicateAccount.description_other: You already have {{count}} accounts for {{siteUrl}}. Adding another may create duplicates. Do you want to continue?
duplicateAccount.descriptionExact: An account for {{siteUrl}} with user ID {{userId}} already exists ({{username}}). Adding another may create duplicates. Do you want to continue?
duplicateAccount.title: Duplicate account
